_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the impacts of internal and external partner staffing estimates.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-009 (AB, cosine: 0.403), AB-T-003 (AB, cosine: 0.394).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.259). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [estimates, external, impacts, internal, knowledge, partner] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.894, R=0.867). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.9%). "Knowledge of the impacts of internal and external partner staffing estimates." and "Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.409 > STS 0.259 (gap +0.150). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [estimates, external, impacts, internal, knowledge, partner]. WIDAI terms: [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics].
